notes: Phase 3 established a donor-scoped portal surface using the linked donor profile, legacy donation ledger rows, and user-bound receipts without altering legacy donor management writes.

Phase 4 can add new reporting services and management-only summary views on top of the guardian, donor, invoice, payment, and receipt boundaries while preserving existing report route names and totals.
Any Phase 4 semantic difference from the legacy reporting totals must be documented explicitly instead of silently replacing the old reports.
